question_text: A washing machine uses 2,160,000 J of energy during one wash cycle. If the washing machine has a power rating of 1,800 W, how long does the wash cycle take?
explanation: Rearrange the formula P = E/t to get t = E/P. Divide the energy by the power: 2,160,000 J ÷ 1,800 W = 1,200 seconds. To convert to minutes, divide by 60: 1,200 ÷ 60 = 20 minutes.
